<?php namespace Faker\Provider\de_CH; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = [ 'gmail.com', 'hotmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'googlemail.com', 'gmx.ch', 'bluewin.ch', 'swissonline.ch', ]; protected static $tld = ['com', 'com', 'com', 'net', 'org', 'li', 'ch', 'ch']; }
